title: Button Animations
description: Adds satisfying click and hover animations to buttons
body:
# Button Animations

Button Animations is a lightweight client-side mod that improves how Minecraft buttons feel.

Instead of the default hover outline, buttons smoothly scale up when hovered and ease back down when clicked, creating a cleaner and more responsive UI. The result is subtle, satisfying feedback that makes menus feel more polished without changing their layout or functionality.

## Features

- Removes the default button hover outline
- Adds a smooth hover grow animation
- Adds a soft click press-and-bounce effect
- Has a config screen
- Works across Minecraft's standard button-based menus
- Client-side only

## Why use it?

Minecraft's default buttons are functional, but a little stiff. Button Animations keeps the vanilla look while making interaction feel more modern and tactile. It is designed to be noticeable without being distracting.

## Compatibility

- Fabric
- Client-side only
- [Button Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/buttonfix) recommended

This mod does not need to be installed on the server.

## Notes

Button Animations focuses only on button interaction and visual feedback. It does not add new menus, settings, or gameplay changes. The default keybind for the config is "B".
